title: Austin Museum of Digital Art
body: The Austin Museum of Digital Art (AMODA) is a digital art museum located in Austin, Texas. AMODA was founded in 1997 by Harold Chaput, Samantha Krukowski and Chris Rankin. The project is funded and supported in part by a grant from the Texas Commission on the Arts and in part by the City of Austin Economic Development Department/Cultural Arts Division.
